title: S&P, Nasdaq, Dow all down ~0.6% amid Iran uncertainty
snippet: BNN Bloomberg reports all three major US indices closed down approximately 0.6% on Monday amid Iran war uncertainty. The ceasefire extension was announced after market close and did not affect the closing prices.
tag_reason: 4/21 당일 주식시장 종가 데이터는 날짜별 고유 정보.
